case_title: SARITA MARIA LEDET VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEDET, SARITA MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $57.53 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,357.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
